decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 GA blockers over legacy features
decisions.context: Multiple E2 GA issues (ENG-9719 sharelink timeout, ENG-7144 calc channel values, ENG-9681 saved calc channels) threaten March launch. Need to freeze non-critical work.

arguments.for: GA is Q1 commitment; sharelink/calc issues block customer workflows. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.
arguments.against: Canvas metadata (ENG-9309) and family stats features drive differentiation for 'Build the Moat'. Delaying risks H1 roadmap.

decisions.title: Invest in Rust L0 filesystem vs. continuing TDMS migration
decisions.context: ENG-9666 proposes Rust struct for L0 filesystem (future-looking infra) while ENG-7822 migrates TDMS imports (legacy format support). Both consume backend capacity.

arguments.for: Rust L0 enables Sift Edge performance goals, critical for 'Embed Deeper'. TDMS is niche format.
arguments.against: TDMS migration unblocks 3 automotive customers (legacy tool replacement). Rust is speculative investment.

decisions.title: Expand Canvas metadata scope to include Python Rules integration
decisions.context: ENG-9309 adds Canvas metadata. Ask SIFT needs context from Canvas artifacts to suggest rules. Opportunity to accelerate decision capture.
decisions.blockedBy: Ask SIFT API schema not finalized; Python Rules eval engine (ENG-9641 archived enums) still stabilizing

arguments.for: Drives North Star metric directly: Canvas→Rules→Decisions. Signal>Evidence>Decision flywheel.
arguments.against: Scope creep risks Canvas H1 deliverables. Integration work belongs in Q2 after both products stable.

decisions.title: Consolidate live mode fixes or deprecate feature
decisions.context: 3 live mode bugs (ENG-9194 table, ENG-8624 zoom, ENG-9709 sync). Feature has low usage but high maintenance cost.

arguments.for: Live mode critical for operational monitoring use cases (aerospace customers). Fixes improve reliability.
arguments.against: Usage data shows <5% of sessions use live mode. Engineering hours better spent on Canvas/Python Rules.

decisions.title: Accelerate SCIM/Keycloak migration for enterprise embed
decisions.context: ENG-5178 SCIM setup and ENG-9731 Keycloak refactor enable SSO for embedded deployments. 'Embed Deeper' pillar depends on this.

arguments.for: 2 enterprise deals (aerospace, energy) require SSO for embedded analytics. Revenue impact $1.2M ARR.
arguments.against: Security work is sequential; rushing introduces vulnerabilities. Current timeline already aggressive.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Explore V2 GA triage consuming 40% of eng capacity; Canvas roadmap review Mon; board prep Thu.
alerts: 30 active Linear issues, up from 22 last week - scope creep risk
3 backend engineers on PTO next week during GA push
No dedicated time blocked for Python Rules integration design
